texto: To live on as we have is to leave behind joy, and love, and companionship, because we know it to be transitory, of the moment. We know it will turn to ash. Only those whose lives are brief can imagine that love is eternal. You should embrace that remarkable illusion. It may be the greatest gift your race has ever received.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lorien - Babylon 5 sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “To live on as we have is to leave behind joy, and love, and companionship, because we know it to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, babylon-5, eternity, útil em momentos de eternity e illusions.
